Here's the result of running `cat -n` on C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_433e9964c69548b99bdaac1ca35d934c_92tqmoja\app.py:
1	from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request, flash
2	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
3	from flask_login import LoginManager, UserMixin, login_user, login_required, logout_user, current_user
4	from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
5	from datetime import datetime
6	import os
7	
8	app = Flask(__name__)
9	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'secret-key-goes-here'
10	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///db.sqlite'
11	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
12	
13	db = SQLAlchemy(app)
14	login_manager = LoginManager()
15	login_manager.login_view = 'login'
16	login_manager.init_app(app)
17	
18	class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
19	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
20	    username = db.Column(db.String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
21	    password = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
22	    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)
23	
24	class Task(db.Model):
25	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
26	    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
27	    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
28	    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
29	    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
30	    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
31	
32	@login_manager.user_loader
33	def load_user(user_id):
34	    return User.query.get(int(user_id))
35	
36	@app.route('/')
37	def index():
38	    if current_user.is_authenticated:
39	        tasks = Task.query.filter_by(user_id=current_user.id).all()
40	        return render_template('index.html', tasks=tasks)
41	    return render_template('index.html')
42	
43	@app.route('/login', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
44	def login():
45	    if request.method == 'POST':
46	        username = request.form.get('username')
47	        password = request.form.get('password')
48	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
49	        if user and check_password_hash(user.password, password):
50	            login_user(user)
51	            return redirect(url_for('index'))
52	        flash('Please check your login details and try again.')
53	    return render_template('login.html')
54	
55	@app.route('/register', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
56	def register():
57	    if request.method == 'POST':
58	        username = request.form.get('username')
59	        password = request.form.get('password')
60	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
61	        if user:
62	            flash('Username already exists')
63	            return redirect(url_for('register'))
64	        new_user = User(username=username, password=generate_password_hash(password, method='pbkdf2:sha256'))
65	        db.session.add(new_user)
66	        db.session.commit()
67	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
68	    return render_template('register.html')
69	
70	@app.route('/logout')
71	@login_required
72	def logout():
73	    logout_user()
74	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
75	
76	@app.route('/task/add', methods=['POST'])
77	@login_required
78	def add_task():
79	    title = request.form.get('title')
80	    priority = request.form.get('priority')
81	    due_date_str = request.form.get('due_date')
82	    due_date = None
83	    if due_date_str:
84	        due_date = datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
85	    
86	    new_task = Task(title=title, priority=priority, due_date=due_date, owner=current_user)
87	    db.session.add(new_task)
88	    db.session.commit()
89	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
90	
91	@app.route('/task/done/<int:task_id>')
92	@login_required
93	def mark_done(task_id):
94	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
95	    if task.owner != current_user:
96	        return redirect(url_for('index'))
97	    task.is_done = True
98	    db.session.commit()
99	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
100	
101	@app.route('/task/delete/<int:task_id>')
102	@login_required
103	def delete_task(task_id):
104	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
105	    if task.owner != current_user:
106	        return redirect(url_for('index'))
107	    db.session.delete(task)
108	    db.session.commit()
109	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
110	
111	if __name__ == '__main__':
112	    with app.app_context():
113	        db.create_all()
114	    app.run(debug=True)
